basic_details.job_title: AIC Appointed Actuary Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Agriculture Insurance Company of India Limited (AIC)
basic_details.short_information: Agriculture Insurance Company of India Limited (AIC) Recruitment 2026: Agriculture Insurance Company of India Limited has released the official notification for 1 Appointed Actuary posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking banking jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Fellow member of the Institute of Actuaries of India (IAI) with at least 9 years of experience in General Insurance, out of which a minimum of 4 years should be post-fellowship experience. Minimum 3 years of experience in middle/senior level management role.
qualification.details: Fellow member of the Institute of Actuaries of India (IAI), in accordance with the Actuaries Act, 2006. Possess a valid Certificate of Practice (CoP) issued by IAI and the same shall remain valid throughout the tenure. At least 9 years of experience in the area of General Insurance, out of which a minimum of 4 years should be post-fellowship experience. At least 2 years post-fellowship experience in preparation or review of annual statutory valuation or Product pricing specifically relating to Indian General Insurer; or Indian Reinsurer; or Foreign Reinsurer's Branch (FRB) established in India. Minimum 3 years' experience in middle/senior level management role. Must not have committed any professional or other misconduct.

salary_details.details: Salary is commensurate with qualification and experience.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Appointed Actuary position at AIC?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Appointed Actuary position at Agriculture Insurance Company of India Limited is 29-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Appointed Actuary role?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification is to be a Fellow member of the Institute of Actuaries of India (IAI) with specific experience requirements in General Insurance.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Appointed Actuary post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Appointed Actuary position at Agriculture Insurance Company of India Limited.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Appointed Actuary position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Appointed Actuary position is 65 years as of 01.03.2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to send their duly filled application along with requisite documents via email to the specified address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job (full-time/part-time/contract)?
faq.answer: The job is on a full-time contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Appointed Actuary role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates followed by a personal interview.

faq.question: Q9. What kind of experience is required for the Appointed Actuary post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 9 years of experience in General Insurance, with at least 4 years post-fellowship, and 3 years in a middle/senior management role is required.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: The official notification and application details can be found in the Important Links section of this article, including a link to the official website.
